message:
feat: larger nodes, refined arrows, rebuild WASM for production

- Increase node padding (56→72 horiz, 36→44 vert) and minimums (84x44→100x52)
- Increase layout spacing (72→80 node, 112→120 rank, 48→52 cluster)
- Redesign all 6 arrow marker types: smaller refined chevrons instead of chunky triangles
- Rebuild WASM binary with all rendering improvements (348KB gzipped)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
